creator: aduitsis@douitsis.com
text:
Some more info, in case it helps:

- Everything using libcrypto.so.6 can be affected. I've noticed problems with ssh server (ssh child dies with segfault), cyrus-imapd and check-imaps from nagios plugins. 
- Ssh'ing from another FreeBSD to a system with the problematic sshd is successful, but ssh'ing using openssh client e.g. from a linux box is not. Some clients do work, some do not. So some care must be taken to reproduce the problem, as not all clients trigger the problem.
